rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code residence homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §29.123 governs the state plan for gifted and talented student education. The two provisionsaddress unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: The State Board of Education shall develop and periodically update a state plan for the education of gifted and talented students to guide school districts in establishing and improving programs for identified students.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and gifted/talented education state plan statute.
